title: Defrost a C. elegans strain from the -80 C freezer

steps: Take the frozen C. elegans tube out of the -80 C freezer.
Put the tube in a foam floater.
Put the foam floater on the surface of lukewarm water in a beaker.
When the content of the tube has defrosted (should take only a few minutes), pour the contents onto an NGM plate seeded with bacteria.
Put the plate in a plastic box and put the box into an incubator, for example a 20 C incubator.
The following day, check that some worms are alive. I would recommend having at least 60 living pre-reprodutive or reproductive worms on the plate.
creator: Cristian Riccio
